info.title: ttok
info.description: Count, encode, decode, and explore BPE tokens — powered by the fastest .NET tokenizer.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --model
options.description: Model name for tokenizer selection. [default: gpt-4o]

options.name: --encoding
options.description: Encoding name (e.g. cl100k_base, o200k_base). Overrides --model.

options.name: --encode
options.description: Output token IDs instead of count.

options.name: --decode
options.description: Decode token IDs from input back to text.

options.name: --explore
options.description: Show token boundaries with | delimiters.

options.name: --truncate
options.description: Truncate input to N tokens and output the result.

options.name: --include
options.description: Include only files matching these patterns (e.g. *.cs).

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Exclude files matching these patterns (e.g. **/bin/**).

options.name: --max-file-size
options.description: Skip files larger than this size (e.g. 10mb, 500kb). [default: 50mb]

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: table or json. [default: table]

options.name: --max-tokens
options.description: Exit with code 2 if total tokens exceed this limit.

options.name: --context-check
options.description: Show token count as percentage of model's context window.

options.name: --sort
options.description: Sort results: tokens (largest first) or name.

options.name: --group-by
options.description: Group results by: ext.

options.name: --top
options.description: Show only the top N files by token count.

options.name: --no-default-excludes
options.description: Disable default directory exclusions (bin, obj, node_modules, etc.).

options.name: --no-gitignore
options.description: Disable .gitignore processing (include all non-binary files).

options.name: --follow-symlinks
options.description: Follow symbolic link directories (skipped by default to avoid loops).

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress the summary footer (separator + total line).

options.name: --progress
options.description: Show progress to stderr during directory scans.

options.name: --stats
options.description: Show scan statistics (files examined, skipped, timing) to stderr.

arguments.name: PATHS
arguments.description: Files or directories to count tokens for. Reads from stdin if omitted.
